name: geny-2d-avatar
description: Live2D 프리셋 뼈대 + 새 텍스처 (AI 생성 또는 업로드) = 완성된 Live2D 모델. Web UI 기반 아바타 생성 파이프라인

scripts.build:packages: pnpm -F @geny/exporter-core run build && pnpm -F @geny/web-avatar run build && pnpm -F @geny/web-avatar-renderer run build && pnpm -F @geny/web-avatar-renderer-pixi run build && pnpm -F @geny/api run build
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm -F @geny/web-preview run build:public
scripts.dev: pnpm install && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm -F @geny/web-preview run build:public && concurrently --kill-others --names api,web -c blue,green "pnpm -F @geny/api start" "pnpm -F @geny/web-preview run serve"
scripts.start: pnpm setup && concurrently --kill-others --names api,web -c blue,green "pnpm -F @geny/api start" "pnpm -F @geny/web-preview run serve"
